title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/11/2025
Dce Iron ore experienced a strong and fluctuating trend today. The main contract I2601 setiled at 792 yuan,up 1.41% from the previous trading day, with an expanded gain. Traders demonstrated moderate willingness to offload inventories, while steel mills procured based on immediate needs, resulting in an overall acceptable market transaction atmosphere.
